videos.title: This IELTS Speaking Part 2 Strategy ACTUALLY Works
videos.description:
Here's how you can answer even the trickiest IELTS Speaking Part 2 questions and get a Band 9 (including insider tips from a former examiner).

videos.title: Understand IELTS Writing: Tips and practice questions for Task 1 and 2  | TakeIELTS Preparation
videos.description:
What topics can you expect in your IELTS Writing test? In this video we’ll explore some useful tips and practice questions for IELTS Writing Task 1 and Task 2.
